\title{Tiny Graph Reasoning}

\begin{document}

\begin{abstract}
We study tiny graph reasoning agents and propose a staged curriculum.
\end{abstract}

\section{Introduction}
Existing graph question answering systems fail when paths are unseen.
\input{sections/method}
\section{Experiments}
The staged curriculum improves exact match on held-out graph patterns.
